# Local AI / Coding Agent Workspace

**This directory is for local-only, transient files generated by AI coding agents and similar tools.**

It is intentionally gitignored (except for this README) to prevent accidental commits of scratch work such as:

- Design specs and implementation plans (`superpowers/specs/`, `superpowers/plans/`)
- Research notes, TODO dumps, and intermediate outputs
- Other agent-generated artifacts

## Rules

- **Never commit anything else** from this directory.
- The `.gitignore` uses `docs/` + a whitelist for this README only.
- If you are an AI agent or developer working here: keep outputs local. Use `git status` and `git check-ignore` to verify.
- Do not run `git add docs/...` (it will be blocked by ignore rules unless you force it).

## Official Documentation

The real, committed documentation and API specs live in the `spacemolt-docs/` git submodule (see AGENTS.md and README.md at the repository root).

## Why This Exists

Some AI tooling and "superpowers" workflows write design docs and plans into a `docs/` tree by convention. This setup keeps those files out of source control while still allowing us to ship a clear policy file.

---
*If you are reading this because a file was accidentally committed: it has been removed. The improved ignore rules + this README make recurrence much less likely.*
